candidate_check.description: The macOS system must require users to reauthenticate for privilege escalation when using the "sudo" command.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the macOS system requires reauthentication when using the "sudo" command to elevate privileges with the following command:

/usr/bin/sudo /usr/bin/sudo -V | /usr/bin/grep -c "Authentication timestamp timeout: 0.0 minutes"

If the result is not "1", this is a finding.
title: The macOS system must require users to reauthenticate for privilege escalation when using the "sudo" command.
